text: Turkey to offer training sessions on financial concepts and budget management to enable individuals to use financial tools and services. Inclusive Fintech 50 Collaborative partnership that annually leverages a competitive process to identify 50 early-stage fintechs driving financial inclusion worldwide. The competition offers participants exposure to investors and others who can help them grow. Accion Venture Lab Visa double bottom line investment in venture capital fund supporting early-stage fintechs reaching underserved consumers and small and microbusinesses. Rappi Visa strategic partnership with Rappi to accelerate digital commerce and financial inclusion in Latin America and the Caribbean. Guatemala COVID Relief Visa Direct technology enabled instant deposits into the accounts of the beneficiaries of the Bono Familia government emergency subsidies programme in Guatemala. Universal Postal Union (UPU) Visa partnership with UPU to establish the Financial Inclusion Technical Assistance Facility initiative, a programme to support national posts to digitise payments and advocate for inclusion. VC Include Visa Foundation partnership accelerating investment into diverse emerging fund managers in the United States. Black Ambition A racial equity and entrepreneurship initiative launched by producer and entrepreneur Pharrell Williams and partnered with Historically Black Colleges and Universities, with support from Visa Foundation. Tipping Point Community Visa Foundation partnership to provide pathways to economic opportunity via local, non-profit organisations working to educate, employ, house and support vulnerable communities in the Bay Area. Bridge for Billions Visa partnership with Bridge for Billions to power a mentorship programme where Visa employees support social start-ups in creating a validated business plan in 3-4 months. Visa Black Scholars and Jobs Programme Visa partnership with the Thurgood Marshall College Fund to offer selected college-bound Black and African American high school students in the US yearly scholarship assistance. Visa Foundation COVID Relief Visa Foundation has provided $15M in emergency relief to support organisations on the frontlines responding to the global COVID-19 pandemic, including nearly $4 million to the Red Cross and $4.5 million to Gavi, the Vaccine Alliance. Back to Business Visa web-based tool to help find businesses that are open in the aftermath of a natural disaster by identifying companies that have successfully processed a Visa transaction. Relief donations Visa and Visa Foundation provide financial donations for disaster relief in times of crises. Visa offers double matching for employee donations to select charities responding on the ground. Employees making a difference Visa encourages and supports employees to make an impact in ways that inspire
